children.value: Eye Ball is a research project led to explore how gaze tracking can be used for novel interfaces in immersive multiplayer games. We tested how gaze interactions could augment VR dodgeball-- for example, if you closed your eyes, a shield would pop up to protect you!

Eye Ball is a research project led to explore how gaze tracking can be used for novel interfaces in immersive multiplayer games. We tested how gaze interactions could augment VR dodgeball-- for example, if you closed your eyes, a shield would pop up to protect you!
